plugins.name: pr-workflow
plugins.description: Collection of PR and commit workflow skills including PR descriptions, reviews, stacking, and commit messages

plugins.name: codebase-analysis
plugins.description: Codebase analysis skills: comprehensive audits (security, privacy, architecture, code quality) and dead code detection

plugins.name: codebase-ops
plugins.description: Structured refactoring and codebase migration skills: extract, split, rename, swap libraries, upgrade dependencies, and modernize patterns

plugins.name: release
plugins.description: Versioned releases with automated version bumps, tagging, release notes, and GitHub release publishing

plugins.name: planning
plugins.description: Pre-coding project planning: decompose specs, requirements, and design docs into actionable task files
